1.content: Research and analyze existing Budlife NC website and competitor THCA e-commerce sites
1.details: 1. Analyze current budlifenc.com structure, products, and brand identity. 2. Research binoidcbd.com for clean layouts and conversion features. 3. Research getbudd.com for product tabs and stock management. 4. Research buddybrand.us for AI-driven reviews and visual emphasis. 5. Research corporate.bud.com for secure tech focus. 6. Document key insights and features to incorporate.

2.details: 1. Create detailed UI/UX wireframes inspired by crysp.co aesthetic. 2. Plan technical stack (React/Next.js, backend architecture). 3. Design responsive layouts for mobile-first approach. 4. Plan premium visual elements (hero videos, product imagery, animations).

3.content: THCA compliance and legal requirements research
3.details: 1. Research age verification best practices for THCA products. 2. Identify legal disclaimer requirements. 3. Research IP-based location restrictions. 4. Plan double verification system (site entry + checkout).

4.content: Request Supabase credentials for backend development
4.details: Get user's Supabase credentials to set up the backend infrastructure for the e-commerce platform including database, authentication, and storage.

5.details: 1. Build responsive frontend with crysp.co-inspired design. 2. Implement product management system with Square integration. 3. Create customer features (accounts, cart, checkout, order history). 4. Implement age verification system. 5. Add admin dashboard for product CRUD operations. 6. Integrate Square API for payments. 7. Add GoHighLevel CRM integration. 8. Implement SEO optimization and analytics. 9. Add educational content sections.

6.details: 1. Test all features including payments and age verification. 2. Deploy to production environment. 3. Provide live preview URL. 4. Create setup documentation. 5. Verify premium aesthetic and functionality.
